title: Bountiful Bounties
description: Tweaks for Bountiful and Compatibility for several mods.
body:
# Bountiful Bounties
Tweaks for Bountiful and Compatibility for several mods.

**Requirements**: [Bountiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful)

## Features
- New Decrees
  - Arboriculture
  - Cooking
  - Mining
  - Smithing (combines armorer/toolsmithing)
  - Tailoring (combines leatherworking/shepherding)
- Adjusted Bounty Pools
- Mod Compatibility
  - Cobblemon
  - Farmer's Delight
  - JE Coins
  - Pokefood
  - Reliquary
  - Supplementaries

---

<details>
<summary>Installation</summary>
Place file into your Worlds Datapack Folder and Resource Pack Folder.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Localization</summary>
- Spanish (es_es); by pyrethrum & myself
</details>
